name: scalardb-starter-skills
description: Beginner-friendly skills to support your first ScalarDB Cluster app. Walk the skills in order to go from an empty Kubernetes cluster to a running Spring Boot CRUD REST application backed by ScalarDB Cluster: select and verify a Kubernetes environment (AKS / EKS / GKE / minikube), start demo PostgreSQL + MySQL databases in-cluster, generate ScalarDB Cluster config (Helm custom values + client properties, indirect mode, SQL enabled) through block-by-block Q&A, start ScalarDB Cluster via Helm with license-key Secret injection, generate a schema file from presets (Order-Inventory / Transfer), scaffold a Spring Boot starter exposing CRUD REST APIs in both the Java API and the SQL API, and audit existing configurations against a reference-backed rule catalog. Targets ScalarDB 3.18.0.
